title: Wholesome Peruvian Pumpkin Picarones
description: A quick, satvik-friendly Peruvian treat that blends roasted pumpkin, tomato puree, and dashi for a unique flavor, baked into dense, golden picarones.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200C and line a baking sheet with parchment.
Whisk the flaxseed meal with water until thick and set aside.
Fold the roasted pumpkin puree, tomato puree, dashi powder, cumin, paprika, and salt into a large bowl.
Add the whole wheat flour, oat flour, baking powder, and salt to the wet mixture, stirring until a dough forms.
Divide the dough into ten equal portions and shape each into a small round disc.
Place the discs on the prepared baking sheet and brush the tops lightly with olive oil.
Bake for 18 minutes or until the picarones are golden brown.
Remove from the oven, cool for 5 minutes, then serve warm as a snack or dessert.
